title: Infinite Firework
description: Enables you to craft an infinite firework.
body:
**Adds a craftable infinite firework item.**

> **The crafting recipe:**
> 
> ![Crafting Recipe for the Infinite Firework](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7052b0e63916246ecbb923f9afd33a2f48b8c886.png)

Note: kinda fixed the offhand bug, just don't swap held items while spamming the firework. 

to give yourself: 
> /give @s minecraft:firework_rocket[custom_data={infinite_firework:true},item_name='Infinite Firework',lore=['Reusable.'],fireworks={flight_duration:1}] 1
